description: Unified contract registry for Virtual Launch Pro. All contracts, endpoints, and tracked assets in one queryable array.

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Form Contract — Developer Match Intake
contracts.governs: Public intake form submission for requesting a developer match (company, contact info, project details, skills preferences).

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Form Contract — Onboarding
contracts.governs: Onboarding form submission (POST) and profile update (PATCH) for Virtual Launch Pro developers

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Form Contract — Onboarding Status
contracts.governs: Public read of onboarding submission status by VLP- reference ID

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Form Contract — Review Submit
contracts.governs: Developer review submissions for Virtual Launch Pro

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Contract — Support Status
contracts.governs: Client support status and posts lookup by client reference ID
contracts.note: Handler returns an extra `eventId` field not present in contract response shape.

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Analytics
contracts.governs: Authenticated operator analytics — submission counts across all four forms, time-bucketed metrics, and Cloudflare page view data via Analytics API

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Auth
contracts.governs: Operator login — validates operator key and returns a short-lived Bearer session token

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Bulk Email
contracts.governs: Authenticated operator bulk email dispatch — filter-based recipient selection, template or custom body, dry-run preview and live send

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Canned Responses
contracts.governs: Authenticated operator CRUD for saveable message templates — list, create, edit, and delete canned responses by user type
contracts.note: Primary endpoint only. PATCH/DELETE routed through canned-responses/[templateId].js for Pages Functions dynamic routing.

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Developers
contracts.governs: Authenticated operator read and mutation of individual developer records
contracts.note: Primary endpoint only. Additional endpoints (list, patch) documented in notes.additionalEndpoints.

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Job Posts
contracts.governs: Authenticated operator CRUD for job posts — create, list active, update, and close; feeds public job listing and bulk email filters
contracts.note: Primary endpoint only. Additional endpoints (list, patch) documented in notes.additionalEndpoints.

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Messages
contracts.governs: Authenticated operator threaded messaging to developers and support ticket display and reply
contracts.note: Primary endpoint only. Ticket list and reply routed through tickets/ sub-directory for Pages Functions routing.

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Post to Developer
contracts.governs: Operator posts a targeted job opportunity to a specific developer record; triggers cronSchedule-aware notification

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Submissions
contracts.governs: Authenticated operator read of onboarding submissions with filter and pagination support

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Backfill Email Index
contracts.governs: One-time idempotent backfill — writes onboarding-email-index/ entries for all existing onboarding records that are missing an index entry or have a stale one
contracts.note: No formal contract JSON — internal utility endpoint. Safe to call multiple times.

contracts.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Cron Contract — Job Match
contracts.governs: Internal job matching trigger — evaluates developer skills against job required_skills, queues notifications, updates nextNotificationDue per cronSchedule
contracts.note: Internal trigger. Auth via x-cron-secret, not operator Bearer token.

contracts.title: Stripe Checkout — Create Session
contracts.governs: Creates a Stripe Checkout Session for free or paid plan selection and returns a redirect URL

contracts.title: Stripe Checkout — Session Status
contracts.governs: Polls Stripe Checkout session completion and payment status for the success.html state machine

contracts.title: Stripe Webhook Handler
contracts.governs: Verifies Stripe webhook signature and updates onboarding records on checkout and subscription events

contracts.title: Partials Loader Script
contracts.governs: Fetches and injects header.html and footer.html partials; populates footer Product links per page

contracts.title: Shared Site Footer Partial
contracts.governs: Shared site footer partial — injected into all pages by partials-loader.js; Product links populated dynamically

contracts.title: Shared Site Header Partial
contracts.governs: Shared site header partial — injected into all pages by partials-loader.js
